channel.title: When It Comes Together (or Falls Apart)
channel.description: Recent content on When It Comes Together (or Falls Apart)

item.title: VMware, Pivotal and the rise of Kubernetes
item.description: Building a successful platform, spinning out into something new, and facing big shifts in the industry

item.title: The Early PM’s Role: Aligning Vision and Team
item.description: Defining direction as the first product managers at a startup

item.title: Engine Yard and the Cost of Venture Capital
item.description: Sharing my experiences at Engine Yard and how venture funding shaped its future
